message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="CI green for Step 6, requesting reviews">
CI green for Step 6 commit `0143878` (run 21967506510). All checks passed.

Ready for review -- please check the implementation at commit `0143878` and provide your feedback.
</teammate-message>

content.text: My review was already sent before CI confirmation. To confirm: I reviewed all HTMX-related files at commit `0143878` and sent detailed feedback with 1 blocking item, 2 minor items, and 1 nice-to-have. The blocking item is that completing a next action on the project detail page doesn't update the action count, stalled indicator, or completed actions section. Waiting for that to be addressed before I can give consensus approval.
